description: Decorated Karaite ketubah. The groom is taking upon himself not to marry another wife for 20 years, but if his wife will become childless he can take another wife after 10 years. He should treat her well and not harm her or her relatives. She is allowed to visit her relatives after getting permission from him.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
